title: Provider step output envelope
description: Output shape for a provider_step run with `enable_user_input: true` (F-012). The provider returns either a `final` answer (step completes, engine commits) or an `ask` (engine suspends, persists a turn-question file, polls for a turn-answer, then resumes the provider with the answer as the next user message). When `enable_user_input` is false, provider_step output is unconstrained free text and this schema is not applied.

summary.description: One-line headline for the step's outcome. Becomes the commit subject suffix.

details.description: Markdown body appended to current-note.md as the node's section. May embed VERDICT lines for reviewer roles.

question.description: Plain-language question for the user. Should be specific and answerable in one round-trip.

options.description: Optional discrete choices. UIs render these as radio buttons; CLIs as numbered list. The user's answer can either pick an option or supply free text.

context.description: Optional narrative background the question presupposes (so the answerer can decide without re-reading the whole note).
